achievements.description: Cycle 9 / Sprint 9 closed at 121.5 story points — Chloe Christie announced in #gdc-pod at 10:51. Strong sprint close ahead of Cycle 10 starting today.

Cycle 10 Sprint Planning completed (14:30–16:00 BST) — full GDCU team planning session with Chloe Christie. Cycle 10 backlog loaded; sprint now active with mass stale ticket cleanup (~20 cancellations during planning).

Two candidate first-round interviews completed today: Thibault Bougard (13:30 BST) and James Whelan (16:00 BST) — both 60-min sessions with Mike Pett, Gabriel Cornoiu, and recruiter Liam Caffrey. Greenhouse scorecards pending.

Roadmap Sync with Ciara Carroll completed (10:30 BST, 30 min) — Mike-organised session covering roadmap priorities ahead of sprint planning, GDCU-8392 WC Cosmo Spins Reskin, GDCU-8619 Operator List, and Jessica Figma file handover risk.
GDCU-8983: Cosmo Spins login issues investigated and all fixes applied by Harden — Done at 15:27. Resolves QA and user-reported login/session issues on the free-to-play game.
GDCU-8913: Mobile Nav Bar Audit completed by Robin John — Done at 08:30. UK sitewide bottom nav bar audit passed; no unwanted errors across popups, sticky items, or cookie banner interactions.
GDCU-8938 & GDCU-8939: Sprint 9 regression testing and automation bug-fixing both Done at 10:41 — sprint closure prerequisites cleared by QA team.
GDCU-8619 Operator List Redesign unblocked — Ciara Carroll now In Progress (updated 10:57 after being Blocked for 21+ days since 16/04). Major unblock ahead of the 11 June deadline.
GDCU-8935 WC Predictor Game design In Progress — Miguel Migneco actively working (updated 14:38). Design missed 13/05 target but has started; 28 days remain to the 11 June hard deadline.
In Product review queue cleared from 6+ items (Monday) to 2 items: GDCU-8955, GDCU-8936, GDCU-8847, GDCU-8948, GDCU-8806, GDCU-8874 all progressed and approved earlier this week.

Betting Tips ACE — IE market cache issue diagnosed and resolved by Carlos Blauth. Shane flagged at 11:31 Football Tips not showing for IE (La Liga tonight). Carlos confirmed Matrix API cache issue; not a product bug. Cleared by 12:08.
Apple Pay page publish error resolved — Harden identified content team had incorrectly filled in fields on gambling.com/uk/online-casinos/apple-pay. Page now publishable.

GDCU-8972 design system scope decision confirmed — Mike confirmed in #gdc-product-design-pod: 2 SPs max, does not need sprint planning inclusion. Ciara to gather stakeholder feedback and update design system.

Jessica LinkedIn recommendation — HR (Lauren Bradshaw) confirmed at 15:57: Mike can write from his personal LinkedIn page. No HR restriction. Process is ongoing and no final decision on redundancy has been made.
QA verified all live tickets — Robin John confirmed in #gdc-pod at 16:42 that QA verification of all releases today passed with no issues.

meeting_summaries.title: Roadmap Sync — Mike & Ciara Carroll
meeting_summaries.summary: Mike-organised 30-min roadmap review with Ciara Carroll ahead of afternoon sprint planning. Discussion focused on: WC 11 June deadline sequencing — GDCU-8392 (Cosmo Spins Reskin) and GDCU-8619 (Operator List) both In Progress with Ciara; Jessica Figma local file backup risk — Ciara flagged on 13/05 that Jessica's files in local Figma drafts risk permanent loss if account is removed during consultation. No Confluence notes found; inferred from calendar data and Slack context.
decisions: GDCU-8392 and GDCU-8619 both carry into Cycle 10 with Ciara
Jessica Figma local drafts to be moved to shared Figma space by Ciara
action_items_from_meeting: Confirm Jessica's Figma files are moved from local drafts to a shared space — must not wait until account removal
Align with Ciara on sequencing: which of GDCU-8392 (WC reskin) and GDCU-8619 (Operator List) takes priority given the 11 June constraint

meeting_summaries.title: Sprint Planning — Cycle 10 Kickoff
meeting_summaries.summary: Full GDCU Assemble sprint planning session organised by Chloe Christie. Cycle 9 closed at 121.5 SP. Cycle 10 backlog loaded; sprint now active. WC 11 June deadline was the primary sequencing constraint. Significant backlog cleanup occurred (~20 additional ticket cancellations post-14:00 including GDCU-8045 Stable Stars HIGH, GDCU-8962 Hreflang, GDCU-7069 Email Components, GDCU-7068 Email Brand Guidelines). New work started immediately post-planning: GDCU-9007 Remove Cosmo Spins Rotation Block (Harden, In Progress 17:04), GDCU-8952 Variations Logic Links by Country Shortcode (Harden, In Progress 16:19), GDCU-8981 Firebase Migration (Carlos, In Progress 16:37). No Confluence sprint notes yet.
decisions: GDCU-9007 Remove Cosmo Spins Rotation Block created and started (Harden)
GDCU-8952 Variations Logic to Links by Country Shortcode started (Harden)
GDCU-8981 Firebase project migration to apps@gdcgroup.com started (Carlos)
GDCU-8045 Stable Stars dev support cancelled (HIGH — stale)
GDCU-8962 Hreflang Missing Return Links cancelled
action_items_from_meeting: Confirm GDCU-8907 Betting Tips Hub resolution path — still blocked and unassigned post-planning
Confirm Group Bets KO call timing with Chloe — was design target met?
Confirm GDCU-8906 NL Claude Tables reassignment given Jessica's consultation situation
Verify GDCU-8432 Geo Locate Images Global HP has a dev assigned in Cycle 10

meeting_summaries.title: Interview — Thibault Bougard (1st Round)
meeting_summaries.summary: First-round interview with candidate Thibault Bougard. Panel: Mike Pett and Gabriel Cornoiu, organised by recruiter Liam Caffrey. 60-min Greenhouse session. Ran back-to-back with Sprint Planning starting at 14:30. No post-interview Slack discussion found. Greenhouse scorecard pending.
action_items_from_meeting: Complete Greenhouse scorecard for Thibault Bougard before tomorrow's Mike/Gab sync at 09:30
Debrief with Gabriel Cornoiu and Liam Caffrey on both today's candidates
Confirm next stage for Bougard (advance / hold / decline)

meeting_summaries.title: Interview — James Whelan (1st Round)
meeting_summaries.summary: Second first-round interview of the day with candidate James Whelan. Same panel: Mike Pett and Gabriel Cornoiu, organised by Liam Caffrey. Immediately followed Sprint Planning. No post-interview Slack discussion found. Greenhouse scorecard pending.
action_items_from_meeting: Complete Greenhouse scorecard for James Whelan
Combined post-day debrief with Gabriel Cornoiu and Liam Caffrey on both Bougard and Whelan
Confirm next stage for Whelan (advance / hold / decline)

action_points.action: JESSICA DORDEVIC — REDUNDANCY CONSULTATION. Jessica is in a ~1-month formal consultation process. She is emotionally impacted. Consultation meeting expected in ~7 days (per her DM at 09:55 today). Actions: (1) LinkedIn recommendation — Lauren (HR) confirmed you can write from your personal page, no restriction; (2) Figma local drafts — confirm with Ciara files are moved to shared space; (3) Agree a clear work plan for the consultation period — she is actively working (GDCU-8902 In Product, GDCU-8906 active); (4) Plan reassignment for her active tickets in case engagement drops; (5) Do NOT discuss externally — HR process ongoing, no final decision made.

INTERVIEW GREENHOUSE SCORECARDS — Two 1st-round interviews completed today: Thibault Bougard (13:30) and James Whelan (16:00). Complete both Greenhouse scorecards before tomorrow's Mike/Gab sync (09:30 BST). Debrief with Gabriel Cornoiu and Liam Caffrey. Agree next-stage decisions for both candidates.

GDCU-8907 BETTING TIPS HUB — Still Blocked/In QA, now unassigned (updated 12:22). Day 9+ blocked. IE cache issue was a separate problem resolved this afternoon. The original QA blocker from 06/05 is still standing. Escalate to Sanja and Gabriel first thing tomorrow: confirm fix deployed, unblock the ticket, restart QA. Cycle 10 has started — this cannot carry a second sprint blocked.

WC PREDICTOR GAME (GDCU-8935) — Design In Progress (Miguel, updated 14:38). Missed 13/05 target. At tomorrow's Mike/Gab sync (09:30) and/or standup (14:30): confirm how far along Figma is, any blockers, and revised ETA for dev handoff. Full scope required: entry flow, 48-match group stage, knockout bracket, outrights, leaderboard, mobile-first 3 breakpoints. 11 June = 28 days.

GROUP BETS KO CALL — Design target was 07/05 (8 days ago). No confirmation it was completed. With Cycle 10 now started, clarify with Miguel and Chloe: is Group Bets design done? If yes, schedule KO call with dev team immediately. 11 June = 28 days remaining. If no, assess scope viability.

GDCU-8902 SPORTS QUIZ DESIGN SYSTEM — In Product (Jessica Dordevic, updated 15:37). Jessica moved to In Product this morning and is actively working. Review and approve promptly — especially important given her consultation period. Output format is Claude Code prompts for fast codebase iteration, not a Figma doc.

GDCU-8971 COSMO SPINS HOW-TO VIDEOS — In Product (Novica Vukobratovic, updated 11:11). Knowledge-sharing videos documenting the Cosmo Spins reskin process. Review and approve to unlock as team resources — directly enables the WC Cosmo Spins Reskin (GDCU-8392) by upskilling the wider team.

GDCU-8810 DEVELOPER ACCOUNTS — Still Blocked (Harden, Day 9+, priority: Blocked, updated 10:57). Critical first step still outstanding: contact RotoWire team re existing GDC Group org accounts for Apple/Google — could collapse timeline from 6–8 weeks to ~1–2 weeks. Ask Harden tomorrow: has RotoWire been contacted?

JESSICA FIGMA LOCAL FILES — Ciara flagged on 13/05 that Jessica's Figma drafts are in local files and could be permanently lost if her account is removed during/after consultation. Confirm with Ciara tomorrow that files have been moved to a shared Figma space.

WC COSMO SPINS RESKIN (GDCU-8392) — Ciara is In Progress (updated 08:23 today). Monitor timeline vs 11 June. Full scope is significant (WC-themed symbols, animations, 3 audio tracks, background, frames, countdown clock, menu animation, banners). GDCU-8971 videos (once approved) will enable broader team support. Check progress at tomorrow's standup.

VIC DADSON — BACK AT WORK. Reintroduction call Monday 12/05 with Mike and Colin. Agree Cycle 10 data engineering plan: loop in Nemanja (Data Engineering) for requirements and knowledge sharing to reduce Vic's pain points. Hospital appointments may continue.

IUJ PRIZE WHEEL QA vs PROD — Mike flagged on 13/05: wheel-slices edit interface in QA Admin but missing in Prod. No resolution confirmed yet. Follow up with dev team tomorrow: Prod permissions gap or missing deployment?

NL PAYSAFECARD 404 — gambling.com/nl/paysafecard returning 404, top-50 high-traffic URL. Chloe confirmed NL team has a new URL and will do a redirect. Verify the redirect has been actioned and a ticket raised if not already done.
GDCU-9003 GA4 EXIT LINK EVENT — New ticket: IUJ exit_link_deposit event not firing in GA4. Assign a dev owner in Cycle 10. Affects IUJ attribution tracking.
GDCU-9006 SEARCH ICON NAV — Shane raised today: search icon no longer jumps to nav bar on scroll. GDCU-9006 created. Assign a dev owner in Cycle 10.

next_working_day.title: Mike / Gab Weekly Sync
next_working_day.synopsis: Weekly 1-2-1 with Gabriel Cornoiu (SEO / data lead). Zoom meeting organised by Gabriel. Gabriel was also on both interview panels today — debrief is a key agenda item.
discussion_topics: Greenhouse scorecard debrief — Thibault Bougard and James Whelan 1st rounds completed today; agree next-stage decisions with Gabriel before communicating to Liam Caffrey
Betting Tips Hub (GDCU-8907) — Day 9+ blocked, still unassigned. Agree escalation plan with Gabriel before the weekend
WC Predictor data dependencies — confirm Matrix data (fixture dating & resulting) exposed via Karl. Check-in with Karl still outstanding
NL Paysafecard 404 — redirect confirmed by Chloe; verify actioned and confirm no further SEO impact
GDCU-8983 Cosmo Spins login fixes Done today — Gabriel is a stakeholder, confirm live status
next_working_day.prep_notes: Complete Greenhouse scorecards for both candidates BEFORE this call — Gabriel needs to align on next-stage decisions. Have GDCU-8907 open; agree whether a direct Sanja escalation or Jira comment is sufficient before close of day. Bring GDCU-8935 WC Predictor status from Miguel if available.

next_working_day.title: Project (personal work block)
next_working_day.synopsis: Mike-organised personal work block. No attendees or location set. Deep-work window mid-morning Friday.
next_working_day.prep_notes: Use this window for: (1) Review GDCU-8902 (Sports Quiz, Jessica — In Product) and GDCU-8971 (Cosmo Spins videos, Novica — In Product); (2) Write LinkedIn recommendation for Jessica if you've decided to proceed; (3) Chase GDCU-8810 developer accounts with Harden; (4) Confirm Group Bets design status with Miguel.

next_working_day.title: GDCU Assemble Standup
next_working_day.synopsis: Full GDCU team standup — Day 2 of Cycle 10. Organised by Chloe Christie via Zoom. Direct reports present: Jessica Dordevic (consultation period — handle sensitively), Miguel Migneco, Ciara Carroll, Victoria Dadson (now back at work).
discussion_topics: Cycle 10 Day 2 check-in — confirm sprint commitments and WC timeline (11 June = 28 days)
GDCU-8907 Betting Tips Hub — escalate 9-day block, confirm owner and resolution path for Cycle 10
GDCU-8935 WC Predictor — Miguel status update and ETA for dev handoff
GDCU-8392 WC Cosmo Spins Reskin — Ciara's progress and timeline vs 11 June
GDCU-8971 How-to Videos — Novica's videos are In Product; review and circulate
GDCU-9003 GA4 exit link event — assign a dev
GDCU-9006 Search icon nav — assign a dev
next_working_day.prep_notes: Come with the WC 11-June message clear: 28 days, three major deliverables still in early stages (WC Predictor design, Group Bets design, Cosmo Spins Reskin). Jessica is on the invite and is emotionally fragile — keep tone positive and focused on work. Do not reference her situation in group. Vic is back; a brief welcome acknowledgment is fine but don't over-focus given the team context.

_meta.jira_note: Done query (today): 8 results — 4 genuine task completions (GDCU-8983 at 15:27, GDCU-8913 at 08:30, GDCU-8938 and GDCU-8939 at 10:41) plus 4 epic housekeeping closures. Status changes (all day): 50 items with 35+ sprint closure cancellations. Post-14:00 changes: 13 items — 4 cancellations from planning, 3 new In Progress (GDCU-9007, GDCU-8952, GDCU-8981), 1 Done (GDCU-8983), GDCU-8432 moved to To Do. Current In Product queue: 2 items (GDCU-8902, GDCU-8971). GDCU-8907 and GDCU-8810 remain blocked.
_meta.slack_note: Active channels today: #gdc-pod (12 messages — sprint close 121.5 SP, QA live verification, betting tips IE cache resolved, Apple Pay publish error fixed, GDCU-9006 raised). #gdc-product-design-pod (6 messages — GDCU-8972 scope decision, sprint close queries). DMs: Lauren Bradshaw at 15:57 (HR LinkedIn confirmation), Jessica Dordevic at 09:55 (consultation timeline update). #gdc-pdmt, #gdc-product-led-growth, #core-product, #gdc-f2p-apps, #gdc-high-agency, #6amigos: no messages today.
_meta.confluence_note: No GDCU space pages modified today. No agenda pages found for 14/05 or 15/05. Notable elsewhere: Project Kronos status report (today), Continuous Delivery Workflow Proposal (BonusFinder/Kinsta — deploys reduced from 2hr to 3min), GDC nonEn Country Leads Meeting for 15/05 (Mike not included).
_meta.calendar_note: M365 calendar authenticated. Today (14/05): Roadmap Sync 10:30 (Ciara), Project block 11:40, Interview Bougard 13:30 (Gabriel + Liam Caffrey), Sprint Planning 14:30 (full team, 90 min), Interview Whelan 16:00 (Gabriel + Liam Caffrey). Tomorrow (15/05, Friday): Mike/Gab Weekly Sync 09:30 BST, Project block 11:40 BST, GDCU Assemble Standup 14:30 BST.
_meta.people_note: Jessica Dordevic: formal redundancy consultation (~1 month); consultation meeting expected in ~7 days. Still actively working. HR (Lauren Bradshaw) cleared LinkedIn recommendation at 15:57. Figma file backup risk — Ciara must action. Vic Dadson: returned to work; reintroduction call Monday 12/05 with Mike and Colin. Hospital appointments may continue. Agree Cycle 10 data engineering plan with Nemanja.
_meta.wc_deadline_note: 11 June 2026 — 28 days remaining. Three WC deliverables still in early stages: GDCU-8935 WC Predictor (Miguel, In Progress — design not done), Group Bets (design target 07/05, completion status unknown), GDCU-8392 Cosmo Spins WC Reskin (Ciara, In Progress). All require design completion and dev handoff this week to hit the deadline comfortably.
